description: Test mocking external HTTP boundary with domain oracle
code:
def test_api_call_with_mock_http(mock_http):
    # Mock external boundary (HTTP)
    mock_http.get('/api/users').returns({'id': 1, 'name': 'Alice'})
    client = HttpClient(mock_http)
    result = client.get_user(1)
    # Domain oracle verifies behavior
    assert result.name == 'Alice'
    assert result.id == 1
